_comment: Per-project atelier configuration. Created by /atelier:setup-project. The operator may edit this file; atelier never overwrites it once it exists. To reset to defaults, delete the file and re-run /atelier:setup-project.

prSize._comment: Per-PR size budget enforced by atelier-pr-size-check (M7.1.F27). A PR is OVERSIZE when BOTH limits are exceeded after exempting auto-generated / test / migration files. Tune these as your project's reviewability tolerance evolves; very small repos may want stricter values, monorepos may want larger ones.

taskDecomposer._comment: Autonomous task decomposition (M4.24.a defines the Epic / sub-task format; M4.24.b adds the agent that auto-rewrites large tasks into epics before implementer runs). Set `enabled: false` to turn off the automatic pass — the operator can still invoke /atelier:slice-task <id> manually. The orchestrator's heuristic for `oversize-likely` only fires when this flag is true.
